purpose: A synthetic, minimal end-to-end snapshot — the SECOND snapshot the §A3 multi-repo gate generalizes §40's four invariants over (kemal is the first, real one). Proves the generalized auditor handles >1 snapshot with no per-repo code; a real corpus snapshot joins the audited set the moment a metered Tier-2 run commits it under validation/integration/snapshots/<repo>/.
note: Synthetic by design (no real engine run); the four structural invariants are exactly what §A3 re-checks per snapshot.
